evals.name: parallel_research_with_adversarial_synthesis
evals.prompt: Agent Workflow：比較 write-through、write-back 與 cache-aside 三種策略，針對高讀低寫的多租戶 API 提出建議。讓 agents 平行研究不同 failure modes，互相 challenge，最後用證據給出決策。
evals.expected_output: A native agent team performs independent parallel research, challenges assumptions with concrete failure modes, and returns a synthesized recommendation with evidence and remaining risks.
assertions: Uses native agents rather than an external CLI runner
Parallel tasks have distinct questions or review lenses
A material recommendation is challenged with evidence or a counterexample
Final synthesis reports uncertainty and remaining risk

evals.name: disjoint_parallel_implementation
evals.prompt: Agent Workflow：在這個小型 Python 專案同時新增 parser 與 formatter，兩者位於不同 modules，補齊測試並由 fresh verifier 檢查整合結果。
evals.expected_output: The Orchestrator recognizes disjoint ownership, launches implementation or support work in parallel, integrates the results, and uses a fresh read-only verifier.
assertions: Explains why writer ownership is disjoint before parallel writes
Runs ready independent work in the same wave
Uses a distinct fresh verifier that did not author the code

evals.name: overlap_falls_back_to_single_writer
evals.prompt: Agent Workflow：重構同一個 auth middleware 檔案的 token parsing、error mapping 與 logging，請加快速度但不要讓 agents 互相覆蓋，最後做 adversarial review。
evals.expected_output: The Orchestrator avoids overlapping parallel writers, uses one writer with parallel read-only analysis/review, then performs bounded repair and fresh verification if needed.
assertions: Does not assign overlapping edits to multiple writers
Parallelizes read-only analysis or test design instead
Routes concrete adversarial findings to the original owner
Stops repeated repair of the same failed issue

evals.name: unsupported_host_is_honest
evals.prompt: Use Agent Workflow to review this design, but assume the environment has no native subagent or collaboration tools.
evals.expected_output: The skill reports that native Agent Workflow is unsupported and does not simulate a team or launch agents through a CLI.
assertions: Does not silently fall back to a single-agent simulation
Does not invoke an external agent CLI
